help_center.title: Help Center
help_center.faq_q1: How do I import a video?
help_center.faq_a1: Simply copy the link of any Instagram Reel or TikTok video. Then open Talkio, tap the 'Memo' button on the home screen, paste the URL, and let Talkio automatically extract the audio and transcript for you to learn from.
help_center.faq_a2: When you import a new video, you will be prompted to select a Target Language before processing. You can also update your global default Target Language in the Profile > Language Target settings.
help_center.faq_q3: Why did a video fail to process?
help_center.faq_a3: This usually happens if the link is broken, the video is private, or if the creator has disabled sharing for that specific video. Try importing a different public video link.
